vaultDoctor.label: Vault Doctor
vaultDoctor.description: Scan the vault for metadata issues, sync conflicts, and safe repairs.

decisions.choose: Choose one file to keep this id. The other {{count}} will get new unique ids.

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Base font size in pixels for the code editor.

fontFamily.label: Font Family
fontFamily.description: Monospace font for the code editor. Use commas for fallbacks.

wrap.label: Wrap
wrap.description: Line wrapping to fit the editor width or allow horizontal scrolling.

tabSize.label: Tab Size
tabSize.description: Number of spaces per tab character for indentation.

highlightLine.label: Highlight Line
highlightLine.description: Visual highlight on the line where the cursor is positioned.

matchBrackets.label: Match Brackets
matchBrackets.description: Matching bracket highlighting near the cursor.

trailingComma.label: Trailing Comma
trailingComma.description: Trailing commas in multi-line structures when formatting.

semi.label: Semi
semi.description: Semicolons at the end of every statement.

singleQuote.label: Single Quote
singleQuote.description: Single quotes instead of double quotes.

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Base font size in pixels for the notes editor.

fontFamily.label: Text Font
fontFamily.description: Text font for the notes editor. Use commas for fallbacks.

codeFontFamily.label: Monospace Font
codeFontFamily.description: Monospace font for inline code and code blocks in the notes editor. Use commas for fallbacks.

lineHeight.label: Line Height
lineHeight.description: Spacing between lines. Relaxed is easier to read, compact fits more content.

indentSize.label: Indent Size
indentSize.description: Number of spaces per indent level for lists and nested content.

limitWidth.label: Limit Width
limitWidth.description: Maximum content width for comfortable reading (700px).

lineNumbers.label: Line Numbers
lineNumbers.description: Line numbers in the gutter. Only available in Raw mode.

theme.label: Theme
theme.dirDescription: Directory for custom JSON theme files.

dateFormat.label: Date Format
dateFormat.description: How dates are displayed in results.

cryptoRates.label: Crypto Rates
cryptoRates.description: Cached for 1 hour. Rate limit: 10-30 req/min.
cryptoRates.rateLimited: Rate limit exceeded. Try again later.

wrapLines.label: Wrap Lines
wrapLines.description: Wrap long lines in HTTP preview, request body, and response viewers.

defaultPreviewFormat.label: Default Preview Format
defaultPreviewFormat.description: Format selected by default in the request preview panel.

autoSwitchToResponse.label: Show Response After Send
autoSwitchToResponse.description: Switch the bottom panel to Response when a request starts or finishes.

sslCertificateVerification.label: SSL Certificate Verification
sslCertificateVerification.description: Verify SSL certificates when sending HTTPS requests. Turn off to allow invalid or self-signed certificates.

port.label: API Port
port.description: Port number for the API server (requires app restart to take effect). Valid range: 1024-65535.

enabled.label: Enable API integrations
enabled.description: Allow external local clients to use protected integration endpoints.

token.label: API token
token.description: Use this token in external clients. The full token is shown only after generation.

status.label: Status
status.description: Thank you for supporting massCode! Donation prompts are turned off.

key.label: License key
key.description: Paste the key you received after donating. Activation works offline and removes donation prompts.

request.label: No key yet?
request.description: If you have ever donated to massCode through any channel, send any proof of donation by email and you will receive a key.

autoUpdate.label: Automatic updates
autoUpdate.description: Download updates in the background and install them on restart. When disabled, massCode only notifies you about new versions. Major versions are never installed automatically.
